title: Luhansk: Ours are returning home. 175 military personnel. Soldiers of the...
title_en: Luhansk: Ours are returning home. 175 military personnel. Soldiers of the...
title_uk: Луганськ: Наші повертаються додому. 175 військовослужбовців. Солдати...
description: Ours are returning home. 175 military personnel. Soldiers of the Armed Forces, national guardsmen, border guards. Privates, sergeants and officers. And seven civilians. Our soldiers defended Ukraine in various directions: in Mariupol, at the Chernobyl nuclear power plant, in the Donetsk, Luhansk, Kharkiv, Kherson, Zaporizhzhya, Sumy, Kyiv, Kursk directions. There are wounded among them. Most have been in captivity since 2022. And finally -...
description_en: Ours are returning home. 175 military personnel. Soldiers of the Armed Forces, national guardsmen, border guards. Privates, sergeants and officers. And seven civilians. Our soldiers defended Ukraine in various directions: in Mariupol, at the Chernobyl nuclear power plant, in the Donetsk, Luhansk, Kharkiv, Kherson, Zaporizhzhya, Sumy, Kyiv, Kursk directions. There are wounded among them. Most have been in captivity since 2022. And finally -...
description_uk: Наші повертаються додому. 175 військових. Воїни Збройних Сил, нацгвардійці, прикордонники. Рядові, сержанти та офіцери. І семеро цивільних. Наші воїни захищали Україну на різних напрямках: у Маріуполі, на ЧАЕС, на Донецькому, Луганському, Харківському, Херсонському, Запорізькому, Сумському, Київському, Курському напрямках. Серед них є поранені. Більшість була в полоні з 2022 року. І нарешті –...

title: Kyiv: Casualties reported
description: Civilian casualties double in Ukraine amid escalating short-range drone attacks, UN says. According to the report, at least 211 people were killed in March, and 1,206 were injured.
description_en: Civilian casualties double in Ukraine amid escalating short-range drone attacks, UN says. According to the report, at least 211 people were killed in March, and 1,206 were injured.
description_uk: Civilian casualties double in Ukraine amid escalating short-range drone attacks, UN says. According to the report, at least 211 people were killed in March, and 1,206 were injured.

title: 🚆UZ launches a direct flight from Kyiv railway station to Chisinau...
title_en: 🚆UZ launches a direct flight from Kyiv railway station to Chisinau...
title_uk: 🚆UZ запускає прямий рейс з Київського вокзалу до Кишинева...
description: 🚆UZ launches a direct flight from Kyiv railway station to Chisinau airport: for the time being, on April 13, the train will reach Revaka for the first time in a test mode, from where passengers will be delivered by shuttle to Chisinau International Airport for free. If the demand is high, the stop can be made a permanent part of the route.
description_en: 🚆UZ launches a direct flight from Kyiv railway station to Chisinau airport: for the time being, on April 13, the train will reach Revaka for the first time in a test mode, from where passengers will be delivered by shuttle to Chisinau International Airport for free. If the demand is high, the stop can be made a permanent part of the route.
description_uk: 🚆УЗ запускает прямой рейс с вокзала Киева в аэропорт Кишинева: пока что в тестовом режиме 13 апреля поезд впервые доедет до Реваки, откуда пассажиров бесплатно доставят шаттлом в Международный аэропорт Кишенева. Если спрос будет высоким, остановку могут сделать постоянной частью маршрута.

title: Kyiv: Air defense active
description: Poland intercepts Russian Il-20 spy plane for 2nd time in a week. Polish F-16s intercepted a Russian Il-20 reconnaissance aircraft during a patrol over the Baltic Sea on April 9, Polish Defense Minister Wladyslaw Kosiniak-Kamysz said on X.
description_en: Poland intercepts Russian Il-20 spy plane for 2nd time in a week. Polish F-16s intercepted a Russian Il-20 reconnaissance aircraft during a patrol over the Baltic Sea on April 9, Polish Defense Minister Wladyslaw Kosiniak-Kamysz said on X.

Я вважаю, що Європейський Союз перебуває в ситуації, коли йому потрібні додаткові країни. Велика Британія, Україна, Туреччина та Норвегія. Це чотири сильні країни, які є частиною Європи.
